memoryArtifacts.headline: Paisley Abbey where Margaret  and Claud were buried.
This was a Memorial at the Paisley Abbey in honor of the Stuart family from which Margaret's husband decended.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley於1550年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，她的父親Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC22歲，母親Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar20歲。她和Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley至少有10個兒子和8個女兒。她去世於1616年2月10日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley于1550年1月1日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，她的父亲Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC22岁，母亲Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar20岁。她和Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley至少有10个儿子和8个女儿。她去世于1616年2月10日在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Seton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Bartnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from Trøndelag, a form of Old Norse burkn ‘fern’ + nes ‘promontary, headland’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of German   Bartmess  .

variants.name: Bartmess
meanings: American shortened form of German   Barthelmess  .

nameMeanings.name: Paisley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Paisley (Renfrewshire), which is recorded as Passelek in 1298. The placename derives from Middle Irish baslec ‘church’. This name has been established in Ulster since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley was born on 1 January 1550, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC, was 22 and her mother, Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, was 20. She had at least 10 sons and 8 daughters with Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. She died on 10 February 1616, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley est née le 1 janvier 1550, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles avec Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1616, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbey, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley am 1. Januar 1550 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC 22 und ihre Mutter Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar 20. Sie hatte mit Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1616 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley è nata il il 1 gennaio 1550 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie con Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. Morì il 10 febbraio 1616, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisleyが1550年1月1日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PCは22歳，母Isabel Hamilton of Sanquharは20歳であった。彼女はClaud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisleyとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1616年2月10日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで66歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley(이)가 1550년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 2월 10일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1550, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas com Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1616, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley родилась 1 января 1550 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. Она умерла 10 февраля 1616 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности эбби, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley nació el 1 de enero de 1550, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir George Seton 7th Lord Seton, Provost of Edinburgh, Master of the Royal Household, Commissioner  to France - PC, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel Hamilton of Sanquhar, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas con Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1616, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
